CustomField.label: Transcript Content
CustomField.description: Raw VTT transcript from Microsoft Teams meeting (/transcripts/{id}/content?$format=text/vtt). Populated by OA_ArtifactPoller. Used as primary input to OA_AISummaryService. SENSITIVE: contains verbatim business conversation. Restrict via FLS to OA_Marketing_Automation permission set only. Enable field history tracking.
